title: Christ's Twofold Coming.
content:
Thy former coming was to cure
    My soul's most desp'rate calenture;
    Thy second advent, that must be
    To heal my earth's infirmity.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Christ's Twofold Coming."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
